nl_query: Count active script assignments per evaluator.
failed_sql:
SELECT ea.evaluator_user_id, COUNT(*) AS active_assignments
FROM   script_assignment ea
WHERE  ea.is_active = TRUE
GROUP  BY ea.evaluator_user_id
ORDER  BY active_assignments DESC
LIMIT  100;
